i ordered 2 pairs of glasses and i received both on time. i ordered this as it mentioned as blue ray filter glasses. after i received it checked it from an optician, it is not filtering blue ray at all. how shame the way you do business. people buy this as a product to save their eyes and they believe that it does the mentioned task. not knowing that it doesnt work still you cant get rid of blue ray. may be for this price you are not able to provide blue ray filters if so you should not mentioned it as blue ray filter. this is not something about money. this is about human health and sight. if you want a fashion glasses you can buy it. do not play with human health. i did chat with seller and still he is telling it is blue ray filtering. i dont know wether i got the wrong glasses.
